titleStmt.title: SII 4.1306: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 1306. (A.R. No. 391 of 1893). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
ŇõakavarŠĻ£alu 1029 samastabhuvanńĀŇõraya Ňõrńępritivivallabha
mahńĀrńĀjadirńĀja rńĀjaparamńďŇõvara paramabhaŠĻ≠ŠĻ≠ńĀraka ravikulatilaka cŇć
Šłćakula Ňõńďkhara pńĀŠĻáŠłćyakulńĀŠĻĀtaka samastarńĀjńĀŇõraya rńĀjarńĀjńďŠĻĀdra vi
kramacŇćŠłća vijayńĀbharaŠĻáa rńĀjakńďsarivarmmapermmanaŠłćigalu gaŠĻĀggńĀkńĀvńďrńępa
ryyaŠĻĀta saptamŇćviŠĻ£ŠĻáuvarddhanulaina tribhuvanacakravartti ŇõrńękulŇćttuŠĻĀgga
cŇćŠłćadńďvara pravarddhamńĀnavijayarńĀjyasaŠĻĀvatsa 37 Ňõrahi di 390 ŠĻáŠłću cŇćŠłća
maŠĻáŠłćalamu nityavinŇćdavalanńĀŠĻĀŠĻ≠i nallŇęrunńĀŠĻĀŠĻ≠i rńĀjarńĀjavuramuna nu
nna vyńĀpńĀri AraŇõŇęruŠłćayńĀ kŇćvaŠĻáavankŇćmanajaligaŠĻáŠłćaya viŠĻ£uvusa
ŠĻĀkrńĀŠĻĀtinimittamuna ŇõrńębhńęmńďŇõvaramahńĀdńďvarakuŠĻĀ beŠĻ≠ŠĻ≠ina AkhaŠĻáŠłćavartti
lŇćhadaŠĻáŠłćudiviya 1 ŠĻáŠłću . dńęniki nńĀcaŠĻĀdrńĀrkkamu neyu sariyiŠĻĀccuvńĀrugńĀ
ŇõrńębhńęmńďsvaramahńĀdńďvara kilaramura prŇćlabŇćla naviyayu meŠĻĀŠĻ≠abŇćla EŠĻüi
yanayuŠĻĀ beddibŇćla nńĀvayayuŠĻĀ dalarasi navayayu berasina bŇćlu nalvu(vu)
ruŠĻĀ bŇęŠĻĀŠĻ≠agńĀ beddibŇćla navani vasamuna peŠĻ≠ŠĻ≠ina EŠłćlu 50 . nityapaŠłći vŇćya
ŠĻĀgala tribhuvanaŠĻĀgu(ŠĻĀ)Ňõamuna nńď mńĀna 1 . likitaŠĻĀ peddanńĀcńĀryyaŠł• .
